properties.data_description: Analyst opens a board in the browser canvas, makes edits, and the frontend POSTs the updated .excalidraw JSON to PUT /api/v1/boards/:name
properties.name: Analyst edits Excalidraw scene

properties.data_description: Analyst clicks skill button in UI; frontend POSTs to POST /api/v1/skills with {kind, board}
properties.name: Analyst triggers skill (regenerate / sync / analyze)

properties.data_description: Deterministic renderers query Neo4j via neo4j-driver (findNodesByLabel, findNodesById, findNodesByText) over Bolt to build Excalidraw scenes and markdown documents
properties.name: Tool reads Neo4j graph for renderers

properties.data_description: nacl-ba-sync skill (invoked via Pacer -> claude CLI) writes graph nodes and relationships back to Neo4j after analyst edits a board
properties.name: Tool writes Neo4j graph via sync skill

properties.data_description: skill-runner builds whitelisted prompts (/nacl-ba-sync, /nacl-ba-analyze) and passes them to Pacer.run(); Pacer spawns claude --print --output-format=stream-json subprocess
properties.name: Tool invokes claude CLI via Pacer

properties.data_description: Server reads .excalidraw files, .meta.json sidecars, snapshots, config.yaml, and ~/.nacl/projects.json; writes board files and meta after skill runs and analyst saves
properties.name: Tool reads board files and registry from filesystem

properties.data_description: chokidar watches boardsDir; board add/change/unlink and snapshot.created events are broadcast to subscribed WS clients (UI updates board tree and run panel without polling)
properties.name: Filesystem change events broadcast over WebSocket

properties.data_description: registry-watcher service watches ~/.nacl/projects.json; edits made by nacl-init or other tools are detected and broadcast over WS so the UI project picker refreshes
properties.name: Project registry file watched for external changes

properties.data_description: itsalt-pinch hooks (onEnqueued, onStarted, onBlocked, onFinished) feed run.* events to the WS broadcast hub; frontend RunPanel renders queue/running/blocked/finished states
properties.name: Pacer lifecycle events broadcast over WebSocket

properties.data_description: Analyst selects a project in the UI project picker; frontend calls PATCH /api/v1/projects/active; server writes activeProjectId to projects.json and reloads Neo4j driver
properties.name: Analyst switches active project
